# Turnkey Community Examples

This repository is a community contribution hub for [Turnkey](https://turnkey.com) integration examples. It is a submodule of the [tkhq/docs](https://github.com/tkhq/docs) repository. Contributions are MDX files in the `examples/` directory that are published directly to [docs.turnkey.com](https://docs.turnkey.com) when merged into `main`.

Pull requests come from external contributors. Merged content goes live on the Turnkey documentation site, so review carefully.

## PR template compliance

Every PR must have a completed description and a fully checked checklist. Flag any PR where:
- The description placeholder text has not been replaced with a real description of what the example demonstrates
- Any checklist item is left unchecked

## Files changed

A valid contribution PR should only modify:
- One new file at `examples/your-integration-name.mdx`
- The root `README.md` (to update the Community Examples table)

Flag any PR that modifies files outside of these two locations, or that changes more than one file in `examples/`.

## README table

Confirm the Community Examples table in `README.md` has been updated with the new example, including a name, short description, and contributor.
